comment: night-extras (24 Jul, Aden's $5 discretionary, outside the E-tree): three arms sharing e4-v1 as control (identical 100k shard-0 v1 data + standard recipe w005/boundary5/warmup1). x1-seed-twin = exact e4-v1 re-run at seed 1: measures the run-to-run noise floor that prices every past and future verdict. x2-ema-on-recipe = standard recipe + EMA 0.999: does the e3 flatten blow-up (ac46dc65 7.54) reproduce when EMA rides the adopted recipe alone? x3-width64 = base 64 (~7.5M params): early scaling-surface point - does width matter at 100k, informing E8's spend shape before the mint.
